title: SEOUGEE Genuine Leather Dog Collar Personalised, Soft Padded Leather Dog Collars Heavy Duty with Custom Engraved Name Plate Adjustable for Small Medium Large Dogs (XS, Green 18-27cm)
features: 【Exceptional Quality and Comfort】📏 Elevate your dog's style with our premium collar, meticulously crafted from top-grade vintage leather for a luxurious look. The outer layer's sleek finish is complemented by a breathable neoprene lining, ensuring maximum comfort without irritating your pet's skin. Ideal for all dog sizes, our collars come in various adjustable sizes: XS (7-11" neck), S (9-13" neck), M (11-15" neck), L (14-18" neck), and XL (17-22" neck).

【Personalised for Your Pet's Safety】🏷️ Never worry about your furry friend getting lost with our customizable nameplate. Engrave your dog's name and your contact number in bold, legible lettering, ensuring they're always identifiable. The name is prominently displayed, making it easier for a safe return if they wander off.

【Robust and Rust-Resistant Hardware】🌟 Our dog collars feature upgraded, bronze-brushed buckles and D-rings, crafted for durability and long-term use. The hardware is designed to resist rust and withstand vigorous activities, ensuring your pet's safety and your peace of mind. The additional small D-ring serves perfectly for attaching ID tags, while the larger one is ideal for leash attachment.

【Fashion-Forward and Versatile Design】🐾 Stand out with our stylish collar, available in a variety of colors and two-tone designs, making it perfect for everyday use and special occasions. Whether it's a casual walk, a trip, or celebrating holidays like Christmas and Halloween, your pet will always look fashionable and ready for any event.

【Optimized for All Breeds and Life Stages】🐶 Our collars are not just for dogs; they're also cat-friendly! Whether you have a petite Chihuahua, a playful Labrador, or a majestic German Shepherd, our adjustable collars cater to all breeds. The breathable material and adjustable design ensure comfort at every growth stage, from frisky puppies to dignified adult dogs.
description: Product Description Rust-Resistant Metal Buckle Secure your pup with confidence using our collar's rust-resistant metal buckle. Designed to withstand the test of time and the elements, this durable buckle ensures that your dog's collar stays in pristine condition, no matter the weather. The sturdy construction means less worry about breakage or wear, giving you peace of mind during every walk, romp, or adventure. Extra Small D Ring Our collar includes an extra small D-ring that's perfect for attaching ID tags and charms. This additional ring keeps your dog's identification secure and jingle-free, making it easy for you to hear them without the noise of dangling tags. It's a small touch that makes a big difference in the convenience and safety of your furry friend's daily outings. Can Bend Lettering Board Personalize your dog's collar with ease thanks to our flexible lettering board. The board bends to match the natural curvature of your dog's neck, ensuring a comfortable fit while displaying their name and your contact information. The bendable design accommodates movement and growth, making it a long-lasting addition to your pet's wardrobe Double Alloy D-rings Double the functionality with our collar's two alloy D-rings. Attach your leash to the larger ring for secure walks, and use the smaller ring for tags and trinkets. These heavy-duty rings are made from premium alloy, ensuring strength and durability. Whether you're training or just enjoying a casual stroll, our dual D-ring design supports all your needs
